commands.name: init
commands.description: Initialize weave workspace files and probe GDC integration
commands.descriptionEn: Initialize weave workspace files and probe GDC integration

commands.name: map
commands.description: Analyze codebase structure via GDC and optional Graphify
commands.descriptionEn: Analyze codebase structure via GDC and optional Graphify

args.name: deep
args.description: Run deeper Graphify analysis when available

commands.name: interview
commands.description: Ask clarifying questions until requirements and structural changes are clear
commands.descriptionEn: Ask clarifying questions until requirements and structural changes are clear

commands.name: prepare
commands.description: Create research, spec, and phase plan artifacts from requirements
commands.descriptionEn: Create research, spec, and phase plan artifacts from requirements

args.name: splitPlans
args.description: Auto-split oversized plans into multiple shard plan files

args.name: splitMaxPhases
args.description: Max phases per shard when splitPlans is enabled

args.name: splitMaxHours
args.description: Max estimated hours per shard when splitPlans is enabled

commands.name: refine-plan
commands.description: Apply structured plan-note directives to the active plan
commands.descriptionEn: Apply structured plan-note directives to the active plan

commands.name: approve
commands.description: Approve the plan, or finalize a crafted phase when phaseId is provided
commands.descriptionEn: Approve the plan, or finalize a crafted phase when phaseId is provided

commands.name: craft
commands.description: Prepare execution context for a phase
commands.descriptionEn: Prepare execution context for a phase

commands.name: build
commands.description: Run, resume, stop, list, or inspect autonomous build loops
commands.descriptionEn: Run, resume, stop, list, or inspect autonomous build loops

args.name: phaseIds
args.description: Comma-separated phase IDs for run action

args.name: maxNoProgress
args.description: Maximum repeated no-progress failures before blocking

commands.name: status
commands.description: View plans, active phase, and progress
commands.descriptionEn: View plans, active phase, and progress

commands.name: worktree
commands.description: Manage git worktrees for parallel phase or feature work
commands.descriptionEn: Manage git worktrees for parallel phase or feature work

args.name: fromRef
args.description: Base git ref to branch from

commands.name: verify
commands.description: Run build and test verification for the current worktree
commands.descriptionEn: Run build and test verification for the current worktree

commands.name: archive
commands.description: Archive the verified active change artifact
commands.descriptionEn: Archive the verified active change artifact

commands.name: troubleshoot
commands.description: Search global knowledge for solutions or record a new one
commands.descriptionEn: Search global knowledge for solutions or record a new one

args.name: error
args.description: Error message to search solutions for

args.name: record
args.description: Record a new solution instead of searching

examples: weave command=troubleshoot record=true solution="Restart dev server"

commands.name: repair
commands.description: Scan and auto-repair corrupted plan YAML files
commands.descriptionEn: Scan and auto-repair corrupted plan YAML files

commands.name: agents
commands.description: Sync generated agent files and initialize runtime configuration
commands.descriptionEn: Sync generated agent files and initialize runtime configuration

args.name: sync
args.description: Force regenerate agent markdown files from config pool

args.name: init
args.description: Create default maskweaver.config.json with pool template
